OSCP+ · CRTP · CEH · CCNA · Hack The Box — Hacker rank

I find the paths attackers would take through Active Directory and internal web apps — then help organizations close them. I chain small misconfigurations into full domain compromise, and document every step so defenders can follow the same trail.

01 — Background

Security from the attacker's
side of the keyboard

I'm an offensive security professional who works the way real adversaries do — enumerate quietly, chain small misconfigurations into real impact, and document every step so defenders can follow the same trail and shut it down.

My work spans penetration testing, Active Directory exploitation, and internal web application testing, backed by a strong networking foundation (CCNA) and hands-on security engineering — from building and hardening AD from scratch to SOC automation. I publish what I learn as research on my blog.
